productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Light Winter Peach T-shirt
description: CompositionPeach t-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% viscose, has a printed pattern on the front with stud detailing, sleeves and extension of the contoured design of the top, has a rounded boat neck, and snipped edges on the armholes, hemline and around the neckline FittingRegularWash careHand wash using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadecool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this printed pink top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The stud detailing on the chest gives this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
